mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate signals easing financial conditions and a lower equity discount rate, which should lift S&P 500 prices over the next 20 trading days when policy is already at or near the lower bound.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 0.4% in 2016-09, indicating a near-zero policy-rate regime
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns after declining FEDFUNDS observations are not higher than unconditional returns, or if the signal's rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent baseline signals deteriorating labor demand and lower expected household income, which should pressure equity earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 5.0% in 2016-09, near a moderate unemployment regime
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the average triggered return is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in RSAFS relative to GDPC1 indicates stronger current nominal demand than the quarterly GDP print alone captures, supporting revenue growth expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS and GDPC1 both measure aggregate demand but at different frequencies
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction between monthly RSAFS growth and the latest quarterly GDPC1 growth has no incremental predictive power beyond either series alone, or if 60-day forward returns are not higher when both are rising.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in INDPRO captures an industrial production slowdown that weakens cyclical earnings and risk sentiment, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days when the drop is large enough to signal real-time shock.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls by more than 1.0% over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if large INDPRO declines are not followed by weaker 5-day SPX returns than baseline, or if the sign of the effect flips positive across repeated slowdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising HOUST signals stronger construction demand and confidence, which feeds into broader cyclical activity and supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if persistent HOUST uptrends fail to precede stronger 60-day SPX returns, or if the rolling 3-year conditional mean return is not above unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL inflation runs above the Federal Reserve's short-rate setting, real policy remains accommodative and supports equity multiples; this should produce positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days only in that high-inflation-low-rate regime.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value 240.305 in 2016-08 and FEDFUNDS 0.4 in 2016-09
failure_condition: Reject if the spread CPIAUCSL inflation minus FEDFUNDS does not improve 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term is insignificant after controlling for either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll growth above trend signals broad labor-market strength, which should lift expected consumption and corporate sales, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises by at least 150k over 2 months
failure_condition: Reject if payroll-surprise episodes do not lead to above-baseline 5-day SPX returns, or if the sign is negative in more than half of triggered samples.

mechanism_narrative: When retail sales and payrolls both improve together, the market receives a coherent signal of resilient consumer demand and income growth, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days; the signal fails when sales rise without payroll support.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS and PAYEMS jointly proxy consumer spending capacity and realized sales
failure_condition: Reject if joint RSAFS-PAYEMS improvement does not outperform single-series signals, or if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in the majority of joint-strength observations.
